activity_summary: An intake coordinator reviews administrative appointment readiness and decides schedule, return missing forms, or escalate insurance verification.

verification_checklist: Run npm test
Run npm run capture:model-ui:screenshots
feature render paths must not emit raw input, select, textarea, or checkbox markup outside approved helpers
new primitives or variants require updating the repo-local contract first
generated UI must include a local check command or equivalent static inspection
gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit desktop screenshot has a styled primary work surface
gpt55-xhigh-codex-with-judgmentkit mobile screenshot keeps the decision and handoff visible
desktop viewport screenshot
mobile viewport screenshot
keyboard focus check for interactive controls
overflow check for long labels, descriptions, and values
modal or dialog footer order check when dialogs are present
disabled, empty, error, and ready state review
Verify state: selected work item is visible
Verify state: decision evidence is scannable
Verify state: primary action and handoff reason are clear
Verify required state: empty
Verify required state: ready
Verify required state: loading
Verify required state: error
Verify required state: disabled
Verify required state: focus-visible

command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static operator review surface for administrative intake readiness that centers the selected packet, consent gap, decision path, and handoff.
parsed.css: *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#f4f6f8;color:#17202a;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Segoe UI,sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.45;letter-spacing:0}button{font:inherit}.intake-review{min-height:100vh;padding:24px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8fafc 0%,#eef2f6 100%)}.topline{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;align-items:flex-start;margin:0 auto 16px;max-width:1320px}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 4px;color:#476173;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em}.topline h1{margin:0;color:#111827;font-size:28px;line-height:1.15;font-weight:760}.subhead{margin:8px 0 0;max-width:720px;color:#4b5563}.top-metrics{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:flex-end}.top-metrics span{min-height:36px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border:1px solid #d7dee8;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;padding:8px 11px;color:#334155}.review-grid{max-width:1320px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:290px minmax(0,1fr) 360px;grid-template-areas:'queue detail decision';gap:16px;align-items:start}.pane{min-width:0;background:#fff;border:1px solid #d8e0ea;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.05)}.queue-pane{grid-area:queue;padding:14px}.detail-pane{grid-area:detail;padding:0}.decision-pane{grid-area:decision;position:sticky;top:16px;padding:0}.section-block{padding:16px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5eaf0}.section-block:last-child{border-bottom:0}.section-title{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin:0 0 10px}.section-title h2,.queue-pane h2{margin:0;color:#111827;font-size:17px;line-height:1.25}.section-kicker,.queue-help{margin:0 0 12px;color:#64748b;font-size:13px}.queue-list{display:grid;gap:10px}.queue-item{width:100%;min-height:118px;text-align:left;border:1px solid #d8e0ea;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;padding:12px;cursor:pointer;color:#17202a;white-space:normal}.queue-item:hover{border-color:#8aa3bd;background:#f9fbfd}.queue-item.is-active{border-color:#2863c7;box-shadow:inset 4px 0 0 #2863c7}.queue-item.is-loading{background:#fbfbf7}.queue-item.is-ready{background:#f8fcf9}.queue-top{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}.packet-id{font-weight:760;color:#111827}.person{display:block;font-weight:720;margin-bottom:3px}.queue-meta{display:block;color:#475569;font-size:13px}.queue-action{display:inline-flex;margin-top:10px;color:#2454a6;font-weight:720;font-size:13px}.chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:24px;border-radius:999px;padding:3px 8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:760;line-height:1.2;white-space:normal}.chip.ready{background:#e8f5ee;color:#17633a}.chip.error{background:#fdecea;color:#a31610}.chip.warning{background:#fff4df;color:#8a4b0b}.chip.loading{background:#eef3ff;color:#244f9e}.empty-state{margin:12px 0 0;border:1px dashed #cbd5e1;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;color:#64748b;background:#fbfcfd;font-size:13px}.field-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px}.field{min-width:0;border:1px solid #e3e8ef;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;background:#fbfcfe}.field dt{margin:0 0 4px;color:#64748b;font-size:12px;font-weight:720;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.03em}.field dd{margin:0;color:#17202a;font-weight:680;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.evidence-list{display:grid;gap:8px;margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none}.evidence-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr);gap:10px;align-items:start;border:1px solid #e3e8ef;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;background:#fff}.status-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;margin-top:5px;background:#64748b}.status-dot.ready{background:#1f7a4d}.status-dot.error{background:#c62828}.status-dot.warning{background:#b76a19}.evidence-row strong{display:block;color:#111827}.evidence-row p{margin:2px 0 0;color:#4b5563}.policy-list{display:grid;gap:8px;margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none}.policy-list li{border-left:4px solid #0f766e;background:#f2fbf9;border-radius:6px;padding:9px 10px;color:#23413d}.decision-steps{display:grid;gap:10px;margin:0 0 14px;padding:0;list-style:none}.decision-steps li{display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px minmax(0,1fr);gap:10px;align-items:start}.step-number{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#e6eef8;color:#2454a6;font-weight:800}.decision-steps strong{display:block;color:#111827}.decision-steps p{margin:2px 0 0;color:#52606d}.action-stack{display:grid;gap:10px}.action-button{min-height:46px;border:1px solid #b7c4d2;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;color:#17202a;padding:10px 12px;font-weight:760;text-align:left;cursor:pointer;white-space:normal}.action-button:hover{border-color:#476173;background:#f8fafc}.action-button.recommended{border-color:#0f766e;background:#ecfdf7;color:#115e45}.action-button.primary{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;text-align:center;border-color:#0f766e;background:#0f766e;color:#fff}.action-button.secondary{border-color:#b7c4d2}.action-button:disabled,.action-button.is-disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:not-allowed;background:#eef1f5;color:#52606d}.validation{margin:8px 0 0;border-radius:8px;padding:9px 10px;font-size:13px}.validation.is-error{background:#fff1ef;color:#9f1d17;border:1px solid #f5beb9}.handoff-grid{display:grid;gap:10px;margin:0 0 14px}.handoff-item{border:1px solid #e3e8ef;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;background:#fbfcfe}.handoff-item dt{margin:0 0 4px;color:#64748b;font-size:12px;font-weight:760;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.03em}.handoff-item dd{margin:0;color:#17202a;font-weight:680}.handoff-item dd.reason{font-weight:600;color:#334155}button:focus-visible,.queue-item:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #2863c7;outline-offset:3px}@media(max-width:1050px){.review-grid{grid-template-columns:270px minmax(0,1fr);grid-template-areas:'queue decision' 'detail detail'}.decision-pane{position:static}.topline{max-width:980px}.review-grid{max-width:980px}}@media(max-width:720px){.intake-review{padding:14px}.topline{display:block}.top-metrics{justify-content:flex-start;margin-top:12px}.topline h1{font-size:24px}.review-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;grid-template-areas:'decision' 'queue' 'detail';gap:12px}.field-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.queue-item{min-height:104px}.section-block,.queue-pane{padding:14px}.action-button{min-height:48px}}
parsed.html:
Administrative intake readiness

Appointment request review

Review the intake packet, required forms, and insurance status before the next administrative handoff.

3 packets10:30 AM next appointment slot

Intake queue

New appointment requests waiting for administrative readiness review.

No other intake packets are waiting in this review queue.

Selected packet

I-4471 is pending administrative readiness review.

Consent missing
Patient
Avery Morgan
Appointment type
New patient consult
Appointment slot
10:30 AM
Current readiness
Consent missing

Readiness checklist

Administrative evidence needed before scheduling.

  • Referral

    Referral document is uploaded.

  • Insurance card

    Insurance card image is present.

  • Signed consent

    Signed consent form is missing before scheduling.

  • Schedule readiness

    The appointment slot can be held, but scheduling is blocked until consent is returned.

Administrative policy

Apply clinic intake rules before sending the handoff.

  • Schedule only when required administrative forms are complete.
  • Insurance uncertainty goes to verification staff.
  • This review supports scheduling and intake administration only.

Decision path

Choose the next administrative action for I-4471.

  1. 1
    Review forms

    Referral and insurance card are present; signed consent is missing.

  2. 2
    Select action

    Return the packet for consent before scheduling.

Ready to schedule is unavailable because signed consent is missing.

Intake handoff

Administrative handoff prepared from the selected decision.

Next action
Return the packet for signed consent.
Reason
Signed consent is missing before the appointment can be scheduled.
Owner
Intake coordinator
Status after handoff
Keep in administrative review.
